arts.ttl: 'Exceptional' Morgan Rogers has left Pep Guardiola in no doubt after Aston Villa breakthrough
arts.sum: While at the Etihad Stadium - where he'd impressed as an Albion player in an FA Youth Cup semi-final earlier that year, in a game City's youngsters prevailed 4-2 - Rogers was occasionally exposed to first-team training without ever being granted an opportunity on the Premier League stage under Pep Guardiola. You can also get all your favourite content from BirminghamLive's Villa team on WhatsApp. Click here to sign up for breaking updates about the biggest stories in and around the club.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Academy graduate to receive 'salary increase' as negotiations take place over new deal
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly prepared to hand one of their academy graduates a significant salary increase to conclude negotiations over a new contract.

arts.ttl: Monchi and scout spotted as they make check ahead of planned Aston Villa transfer
arts.sum: Only recently, Nypan's father Arne confirmed that his son, coveted by various clubs from around Europe, was in the process of completing a move away from boyhood club Rosenborg ahead of England's summer transfer window. Aston Villa's president of football operations Monchi was reported to have attended Rosenborg's meeting with Eliteserien opponents Valerenga on Easter Monday in order to make a further check on transfer target Sverre Nypan and speak with his father about the prospects of a move.

arts.ttl: 'Makes my job easier' - Early frontrunner emerges in race to be next Man City captain
arts.sum: Manchester City must elect a new club captain next season when current skipper Kevin De Bruyne leaves in the summer.

arts.ttl: Man City could launch a big-money move to sign Newcastle star
arts.sum: Manchester City are interested in signing the Newcastle United midfielder Sandro Tonali. According to a report via Manchester World, they could submit and offer to sign the Italian midfielder at the end of the season. Tonali has established himself as a key player for Newcastle, and he could prove to be an excellent acquisition for […] The post Man City could launch a big-money move to sign Newcastle star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Monchi travels for Aston Villa signing – Holds talks, spotted at hotel
arts.sum: A week ago, we covered claims from Norway that Aston Villa are leading the race to sign Rosenborg BK’s Sverre Nypan in the summer window. Two days later, the 18-year-old’s father, Arne Nypan, said he’s been working on his son’s transfer. arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola admits he's been 'so unfair' to Man City star as he issues apology
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has issued an apology to one of his players following his actions in recent weeks

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola glimpse, cup win - how Man City 'missed' Morgan Rogers
arts.sum: Morgan Rogers never made the grade at Manchester City but is one of the stars of the Premier League now.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer stance could hand Treble heroes another chance
arts.sum: Manchester City do not want players who cannot be fit for multiple games a week, but they may have built up enough cover at centre-back
